description.value:
**Benefit:** Choose one energy type: acid, cold, electricity, or fire. You may replace a spellâs normal damage with that energy type or split the spellâs damage, so that half is of that energy type and half is of its normal type. Level Increase: +1 (an elemental spell uses up a spell slot one level higher than the spellâs actual level.)

**Special:** You can gain this feat multiple times. Each time you must choose a different energy type.
